leadText: Shadow Sneak (Japanese: かげうち Shadow Strike) is a damage-dealing Ghost-type move introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Sneak inflicts damage. It has a priority of +1, so it is used before all moves that do not have increased priority. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Sneak's PP has been reduced to 20. It also increases the user's action speed. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user extends its shadow and attacks the foe from behind. This move always goes first. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user extends its shadow and attacks the target from behind. This move always goes first. LA The user extends its shadow and attacks the target from behind. This also raises the user’s action speed. ZA The user attacks by stretching out a shadow to strike targets from behind.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on a target up to 2 tiles away. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる ２マスまで とどく Conq. The user extends its shadow and attacks the enemy from behind. Super Smash Bros. for Nintendo 3DS/Wii U Hold B to move the shadow. Release B to attack. * MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It reaches up to 2 tiles away.
